title: Ethiopian Injera with Bitter Greens Stir-Fry
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish featuring injera bread paired with a quick and easy stir-fry of bitter greens.

ingredients.name: Bitter greens (such as collard greens or mustard greens)

instructions: Heat 1 tsp of Chinese chili oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of smoky paprika and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped bitter greens and stir-fry until they start to wilt.
Place a piece of injera bread on a plate and top with the stir-fry.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
